author: misilva73
content:
I agree with Gary's proposal. We should move this to "charge-at-access", i.e.,  we move the CALL*/CREATE account-creation charge into the post-state phase at the access point, matching lines the SELFDESTRUCT mechanism. The fail-before-access refund logic disappears (no charge occurs); frame-revert refunds stay on the unified rule.

How are specs and implementations doing it atm? Are they aligned with the 7929 or 8037?

Happy to bring it up on ACDT today
